props.name: ariaLabel
props.description: Sets the aria-label for the icon button in icon-only mode.

props.name: leadingIcon
props.description: Icon displayed before the button text. When no text is provided, displays as an icon button.

props.name: maxWidth
props.description: Maximum width of the dropdown menu.

props.name: size
props.description: Sets the size of the button.

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

props.name: text
props.description: The button label text. When provided, displays as a text button with a dropdown icon.

props.name: type
props.description: The button style variant.

props.name: variant
props.description: Sets the color variant for semantic meaning.

events.name: onAction
events.description: Callback fired when a menu action is selected.
